home.hero_subtitle: Skills ecosystem for your AI agent
home.hero_desc: ClawPlay is the open-source community hub for X Claw social & entertainment Skills. Share ideas, discover great tools, and give your AI agent unified multimodal capabilities.
home.feature_1_desc: Generate images and synthesize speech with a single command. No more juggling multiple API keys.
home.feature_2_desc: Your provider keys are securely stored server-side. Skill developers only receive encrypted tokens.
home.feature_3_desc: 1,000 free quota per account. Explore and experiment without a credit card.
home.feature_4_desc: All Skills are manually reviewed before publishing to ensure quality and safety.
home.feature_5_desc: Copy one command to configure your X Claw environment. Zero configuration needed.
home.feature_6_desc: Code is open source, built by the community. Fork, contribute, and shape the future of AI Skills.
home.cta_desc: Join the community and start creating or using Skills today. Free tier includes 1,000 quota.
home.footer_brand: Open-source community hub for X Claw social & entertainment Skills. Human-reviewed, privacy-first.

home_cli.title: 🦐 One-click CLI Install
home_cli.desc: Set up the ClawPlay CLI and environment in seconds.

auth.welcome_back_desc: The Skill sharing platform for OpenClaw / QClaw / KClaw agents. Keep building and sharing great experiences.
auth.api_key_secure: API keys encrypted. Skill developers cannot access them.
auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to your ClawPlay account
auth.first_login_auto_register: First-time login creates an account automatically
auth.wechat_login_desc: Open in WeChat built-in browser or scan a QR code to authorize
auth.wechat_register_desc: Open in WeChat built-in browser or scan a QR code to authorize. First authorization creates an account.
auth.free_quota: Get 1,000 free quota. No credit card required.
auth.invalid_phone: Please enter a valid phone number.
auth.network_error: Network error. Please try again later.
auth.agree_terms: By continuing, you agree to the
auth.join_desc: Build, share, and discover AI Skills for X Claw agents (OpenClaw / QClaw / KClaw). Get 1,000 free quota.

dashboard.token_valid_30d: Token valid for 30 days. Keep it safe.
dashboard.revoke_failed: Failed to revoke. Please try again later.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Discover curated AI behaviors, creative tools, and community-made Skills that empower your ClawPlay agent.
skills.no_category: No skills in this category yet

submit.title: Share your magic.
submit.summary_placeholder: Describe what this Skill does in one sentence
submit.skill_md_placeholder: Paste your SKILL.md file content here...
submit.review_notice: ✨ Your Skill will be reviewed by our team within 24–48 hours.
submit.step_1_desc: Name, emoji icon, one-line summary, and GitHub URL.
submit.step_2_desc: Include frontmatter with requires.env and requires.bins.
submit.step_4_desc: Your Skill appears in the public directory!
submit.template_note: Your SKILL.md should include frontmatter like:
submit.tip_1: Keep the description short and clear
submit.seed_title: Every great forest began as a single seed.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.desc: We encountered an unexpected error. Your action may not have been completed.

not_found.desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
